mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_memory (user_id, memory_type, content, embedding, importance, access_count, last_accessed, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{memoryType}, #{content}, #{embedding}, #{importance}, #{accessCount}, #{lastAccessed}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_memory SET content = #{content}, embedding = #{embedding}, importance = #{importance}, access_count = #{accessCount}, last_accessed = #{lastAccessed}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_preference (user_id, preference_key, preference_value, confidence, sample_count, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{preferenceKey}, #{preferenceValue}, #{confidence}, #{sampleCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})

INSERT INTO user_habit (user_id, habit_type, habit_key, habit_value, frequency, last_context, last_used_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{habitType}, #{habitKey}, #{habitValue}, #{frequency}, #{lastContext}, #{lastUsedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_habit SET frequency = frequency + 1, last_used_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user_habit SET habit_value = #{habitValue}, frequency = #{frequency}, last_context = #{lastContext}, last_used_at = #{lastUsedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
